title: VectorHawk SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of a VectorHawk SKILL.md file. Standard Anthropic Agent Skills fields (name, description, license) plus vh_*-prefixed VectorHawk extensions. Unknown vh_* fields are rejected; unknown non-vh_* fields are passed through (the AUTH1c registry compile step logs a warning for them so we can track upstream Anthropic spec evolution).

name.description: Standard Anthropic field. Skill handle used as the canonical identifier. Conventionally kebab-case. Maps to manifest.id and manifest.name in AUTH1b.

description.description: Standard Anthropic field. One-sentence human-readable summary of what the skill does. Used by AI clients to decide when to invoke this skill.

license.description: Standard Anthropic field. SPDX identifier (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT). REQUIRED because cisco-ai-skill-scanner emits MANIFEST_MISSING_LICENSE INFO findings when absent (SEC1-T2 empirical finding). Without this, every benign skill flips to a non-clean verdict.

vh_version.description: VectorHawk: semver version of this skill (e.g. 1.2.0). Required for registry publish. Maps to Manifest.version in AUTH1b. NEW FOR AUTH1 — not in existing Rust types as a separate field (current Manifest uses a top-level `version` field).

vh_publisher.description: VectorHawk: publisher id (e.g. 'vectorhawk', 'acme-corp'). Maps to Manifest.publisher in AUTH1b.

vh_permissions.description: VectorHawk: declared capability surface. The AUTH1c registry compile step injects org defaults for any missing sub-field and rejects requests that exceed org-maximum permissions. Maps to Manifest.permissions (with a shape change — see NEW FOR AUTH1 notes).

network.description: VectorHawk: network egress scope. NEW FOR AUTH1 — existing Rust Permissions.network is a free-form String; this enum tightens the shape.

filesystem.description: VectorHawk: filesystem scope. NEW FOR AUTH1 — existing Rust uses hyphenless 'read_only_scoped'; AUTH1b will need to add a variant mapping for 'read-only'.

clipboard.description: VectorHawk: clipboard scope. NEW FOR AUTH1 — existing Rust Permissions.clipboard is a bool; AUTH1b must widen to an enum.

vh_execution.description: VectorHawk: execution constraints. Compile step injects org defaults for missing fields. Maps to Manifest.execution.

timeout_ms.description: VectorHawk: hard timeout in milliseconds. NEW FOR AUTH1 — existing Rust Execution.timeout_seconds is seconds; AUTH1b converts ms→s on load.

memory_mb.description: VectorHawk: memory limit in MB. Maps 1:1 to Execution.memory_mb.

sandbox.description: VectorHawk: sandbox profile. NEW FOR AUTH1 — existing Rust Execution.sandbox_profile is a free-form String; this enum tightens the shape.

vh_model.description: VectorHawk: model requirements and recommendations. Optional. Maps to Manifest.model_requirements with added min_params_b + recommended + fallback fields (NEW FOR AUTH1).

min_params_b.description: VectorHawk: minimum model size in billions of parameters. NEW FOR AUTH1 — not in existing Rust ModelRequirements.

recommended.description: VectorHawk: ordered list of recommended model identifiers (e.g. ['llama3.1:8b', 'claude-3-haiku']). NEW FOR AUTH1.

fallback.description: VectorHawk: behavior when no recommended model is available locally. NEW FOR AUTH1.

vh_schemas.description: VectorHawk: inline I/O JSON Schemas. Optional — a skill without declared schemas accepts and returns arbitrary strings. Maps to files referenced by Manifest.inputs_schema / Manifest.outputs_schema (AUTH1b will materialize these to disk during load OR pass them through in memory).

inputs.description: VectorHawk: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 describing the skill's input object. The compile step validates that this is itself a valid schema.

outputs.description: VectorHawk: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 describing the skill's output object.

vh_workflow.description: VectorHawk: inline workflow definition. Use this for simple workflows (rule of thumb: <5 steps, <30 lines). For larger workflows use vh_workflow_ref instead. Mutually exclusive with vh_workflow_ref. Maps to Workflow.steps in AUTH1b.

id.description: Unique step identifier within the workflow.

type.description: Step kind. Matches existing Rust WorkflowStep variants.

vh_workflow_ref.description: VectorHawk: relative path to a sibling workflow.yaml file. Escape hatch for workflows too large or complex to inline. Mutually exclusive with vh_workflow. The referenced file is parsed as existing workflow.yaml format (reuses Workflow type verbatim).

vh_triggers.description: Trigger phrases that help AI clients decide when to invoke this skill. Lowercased and deduplicated at load time. Examples: ['compare contracts', 'diff legal documents']. AUTH2a.

^vh_(?!version$|publisher$|permissions$|.description: Reject any vh_*-prefixed field not in the explicit allowlist above. This is the namespace guard: unknown vh_* fields are rejected at compile time so typos and outdated authoring guides surface as hard errors, not silent drops.

allOf.description: vh_workflow and vh_workflow_ref are mutually exclusive; exactly one MAY be present (neither is allowed for metadata-only skills).
